narrative_en: Regime coherence 50/100 — the tape is internally tense; confirmations and divergences are competing.
The NVDA/QQQ link is not holding; that is where the tape's internal argument lives.
The next scheduled resolution point is Retail Sales.

رابط NVDA/QQQ لا يصمد؛ وهناك يكمن الجدل الداخلي للسوق.

convergence_note: Convergence — coherence 50/100 (tense); velocity stable; 1 confirming / 1 diverging links; 0 underpriced signal(s).
